name: artscape
description: ArtScape portfolio sandbox Agent backend built on Hypha

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @artscape/backend && npm run build --workspace @artscape/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @artscape/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @artscape/web
scripts.verify: npm run check:hypha && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test
